contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: capoeira: community + berimbau + roots + roda music mode + YouTube SOP alignment
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/22
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/23
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/24
  
  Details:
  capoeira.agroverse.shop conceptual loop closed — community/berimbau/roots + roda music mode + YouTube SOP alignment
  
  Substantial day of capoeira work that closes the conceptual loop between practice content,
  community story, instrument tradition, cacao roots, and music. Plus the YouTube channel
  operations brought in line with the canonical SOP.
  
  Shipped:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#22 — /community.html, /berimbau.html, /roots.html + intro-video
     homepage hero. Three small dedicated pages instead of one /about page so each video
     gets its own SEO landing. Top nav + footer updated across all pages.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#23 — roots.html restore. PR #22 shipped roots.html as a 0-byte
     file because a chained sed truncated it before commit. Restored full content.
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#24 — /roda.html music playlist mode + roots.html copy
     correction:
     - Roda mode: cover, audio player, full PT lyrics, EN translation, historical note
       per track. Slow→fast default (matches real roda tempo arc), random + fast→slow
       toggles, auto-advance, click-to-jump playlist. Reads enriched data/music_library.json
       fields produced by Grok against faster-whisper transcripts.
     - data/music_library.json: enriched per-track with lyrics_pt, lyrics_en,
       historical_note, lyrics_certainty (high/medium/low so reviewers know which were
       reconstructed from cultural memory), cover_image (YouTube thumbnail starter art).
     - roots.html: corrected the misleading claim that 'every chocolate bar funds the
       Tribo Mirim after-school program'. Cacao/chocolate sales fund cacao tree planting
       in the Amazon; donations on this site fund Tribo Mirim. Two distinct funding
       loops, geographically connected but financially distinct. Rewrote section as
       prose ('Same soil, two paths') that keeps the distinction crisp.
  
  YouTube channel operations (no PR — admin@truesight.me channel):
  
  4. Uploaded 5 Tribo Mirim videos (intro, baptism, caruru, berimbau-making, fazenda
     jesus de deus) as public+embeddable. Started with my own ad-hoc titles/descriptions.
     Gary called out the SOP gap (DOWNLOADS_MEDIA_TO_AGROVERSE.md), so re-transcribed
     each via faster-whisper PT (medium model), then ran a Grok pass to compose
     content-aware YouTube titles ending in ' | Agroverse' (per SOP), and descriptions
     with the proper capoeira.agroverse.shop landing-page back-link per video.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
